name: Frozen Cherry Ice Cream Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine graham cracker crumbs, walnuts, oil, sugar, and cinnamon in a mixing bowl. Press into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes. Cool.
5. Meanwhile, spread ice cream evenly over crust.
6. Freeze until ice cream is hard, about 4 hours.
7. Spoon cherry pie filling over ice cream; freeze again until hard, about 3 hours.
